ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student (e.g., male, female) */,
  "race_ethnicity" TEXT /* Race/Ethnicity of the student (e.g., group A, group B) */,
  "parental_education" TEXT /* Parental level of education (e.g., bachelor's degree, some college) */,
  "lunch" TEXT /* Lunch type (e.g., standard, free/reduced) */,
  "test_prep_course" TEXT /* Test preparation course (e.g., none, completed) */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the student attends */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "parent_name" TEXT /* Name of the parent */,
  "parent_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the parent */,
  "parent_email" TEXT /* Email address of the parent */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected graduation date of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the school */,
  "principal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal of the school */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the school */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the school */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the school */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the school was founded */,
  "enrollment_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students the school can accommodate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "teacher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the teacher */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school where the teacher works */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject taught by the teacher (e.g., math, reading, writing) */,
  "principal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal of the school */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the teacher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the teacher */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the teacher was hired */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the teacher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teachers_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the course (e.g., math, reading, writing) */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school where the course is offered */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher who teaches the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the course starts */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the course ends */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade earned by the student in the course */,
  "term" TEXT /* Term or semester the grade was earned */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Academic year the grade was earned */,
  "grade_letter" TEXT /* Letter grade equivalent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the test (e.g., math, reading, writing) */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score earned by the student on the test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was taken */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., standardized, mid-term) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_scores_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "extracurricular_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the extracurricular activity */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the activity took place */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., sports, clubs) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the activity */,
  "instructor" TEXT /* Name of the instructor or coach */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_extracurricular_activities_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, teacher, parent) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the student data */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student whose data was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
